course_title: INTRODUCTION TO SLOPE STABILITY AND EARTH RETENTION
description: Introduction to theory and approaches commonly used in geotechnical engineering practice for design and analysis of slopes and earth retaining structures.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: CIV ENGR/​G L E  330, graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
